programmes.show_description: Laura McGhie with your calls and features through the night. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
We hear from the second-hand-clothes supplier behind Beyond Retro on why he believes a loophole which allows cheap goods to come into the UK duty-free needs to be closed.
Steffan Powell and Rima Ahmed with unique stories from across the UK, explaining details behind the headlines, and the biggest news and sport.
Nicky Campbell takes your calls on the day's talking points, hearing views and experiences from across the UK. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines).
Adrian Chiles gets you set for the weekend with a good-humoured look at the latest news, sport and entertainment. Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
John is not going to dance to their tune. Who's tune? The people who design the layouts of supermarkets. They can play their seductive ditties, but Johnny JR ain't dancing.
Matt Chorley brings you big political guests, the key news of the day, and your views on the issues that matter to you. Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
A round-up of the day's top news and sport with Qasa Alom and Sarah Mulkerrins. Plus interviews with people at the centre of the stories, and regular travel updates.
Maz Farookhi builds up to Wolverhampton Wanderers v Liverpool in the fifth round of the FA Cup.
Live football commentary of Wolverhampton Wanderers v Liverpool in the fifth round of the FA Cup. Plus updates of Ireland v Wales in the Six Nations.
The day's main news stories, topical debate and interviews. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Email: nolan@bbc.co.uk.
Laura McGhie with your calls and features through the night. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Live F1 commentary of Qualifying at the Australian Grand Prix at the Albert Park Circuit in Melbourne.
The big news and sports stories, weather, plus previews of the weekend's sport with Eleanor Oldroyd and Jeanette Kwakye. Text: 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Join Paddy, his listeners and great guests for the ultimate feel good start to the weekend.
Gordon Smart sits in with a hilarious look at the world of sport where guests compete with their sporting punditry.
Steve Crossman builds up to the day's sporting action plus updates of Mansfield v Arsenal in the FA Cup and England v Iceland in the Women's World Cup qualifiers.
Live rugby union commentary of Scotland v France in the Six Nations.
Steve Crossman with reaction to Scotland v France, the latest scores from the EFL, and build-up to Italy v England in the Six Nations.
Live rugby union commentary of Italy v England in the Six Nations plus updates of Wrexham v Chelsea in the fifth round of the FA Cup from 5:45pm.
Live second half commentary of Wrexham v Chelsea in the 5th round of the FA Cup. Listen to the full match on Sports Extra.
Live football commentary of Newcastle United v Manchester City in the fifth round of the FA Cup.
The day's main news stories, topical debate and interviews. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Email: nolan@bbc.co.uk.
